parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ response_type: 'ephemeral', text: ':mag: Running Feature Request Intelligence analysis' + ($json.platformFilter ? ' (filter: ' + $json.platformFilter + ')' : '') + ' for the last ' + $json.daysBack + ' days. This takes 30-60 seconds, I will post the report here when done.' }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
// Slack trigger config: pulls context from parsed slash command.
const slackCtx = $node['Code - Parse Slash Command'].json;

return [{ json: {
  apiKey: 'REPLACE_WITH_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY',
  appId: 'REPLACE_WITH_APP_ID',
  outputMode: 'slack',
  outputPath: 'REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_OUTPUT_PATH',
  slackWebhookUrl: 'REPLACE_WITH_SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL',
  slackBotToken: 'REPLACE_WITH_SLACK_BOT_TOKEN',
  notionDatabaseId: 'REPLACE_WITH_NOTION_DATABASE_ID',
  fileWriterSecret: 'REPLACE_WITH_FILE_WRITER_SECRET',
  channelId: slackCtx.channelId,
  userId: slackCtx.userId,
  userName: slackCtx.userName,
  responseUrl: slackCtx.responseUrl,
  platformFilter: slackCtx.platformFilter,
  daysBack: slackCtx.daysBack,
  cutoffDate: slackCtx.cutoffDate
} }];

parameters.value1: ={{ (function() { var cs = $node['Config (Slack)']; var cm = $node['Config (Manual)']; return (cs && cs.json && cs.json.outputMode) ? cs.json.outputMode : (cm && cm.json ? cm.json.outputMode : 'markdown'); })() }}

parameters.name: X-Writer-Secret
parameters.value: ={{ (function() { var cs = $node['Config (Slack)']; var cm = $node['Config (Manual)']; return (cs && cs.json && cs.json.fileWriterSecret) ? cs.json.fileWriterSecret : (cm && cm.json ? cm.json.fileWriterSecret : ''); })() }}

parameters.name: X-Writer-Secret
parameters.value: ={{ (function() { var cs = $node['Config (Slack)']; var cm = $node['Config (Manual)']; return (cs && cs.json && cs.json.fileWriterSecret) ? cs.json.fileWriterSecret : (cm && cm.json ? cm.json.fileWriterSecret : ''); })() }}

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ files: [{ id: $node['Code - Map Upload Data'].json.fileId, title: 'Feature Request Intelligence Report, ' + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }], channel_id: $node['Code - Map Upload Data'].json.channelId, initial_comment: 'Full report attached below.' }) }}
